title: Parameters for Speed Scale Corrector Module

update_interval.description: Timer interval for estimation updates in seconds. Unit is **[s]**.

max_pose_lag.description: Maximum allowed time difference between consecutive poses used for pose velocity. Samples exceeding this value reset the previous pose. Unit is **[s]**.

max_stamp_lag.description: Maximum allowed absolute timestamp difference between the current pose and the nearest IMU or velocity report sample. Unit is **[s]**.

sensor_buffer_duration.description: Duration of the rolling buffer for IMU and velocity report messages used for timestamp synchronization. Unit is **[s]**.

initial_speed_scale_factor.description: Initial speed scale factor value used before estimation begins.

initial_speed_scale_factor_covariance.description: Initial covariance of the speed scale factor state (P).

process_noise_covariance.description: Process noise covariance of the speed scale factor state (Q).

measurement_noise_covariance.description: Measurement noise covariance used in the Kalman filter update (R).

max_angular_velocity.description: Maximum allowed IMU angular velocity in rad/s. Samples exceeding this value are filtered out to reject obvious curves and turns. Default 0.0105 rad/s (~0.6 deg/s) is chosen around the practical IMU bias/noise floor; tune per vehicle and operation (e.g. with IMU bias cancellation) if needed. Unit is **[rad/s]**.

max_speed.description: Maximum allowed pose velocity in m/s. Samples exceeding this value are filtered out to avoid extreme speeds that may cause inaccurate estimation. Unit is **[m/s]**.

min_speed.description: Minimum required pose velocity in m/s. Samples below this value are filtered out to ensure sufficient motion for reliable pose-differentiation-based estimation. Unit is **[m/s]**.
